title: FriedZane
description: A mod that adds new items and bosses that relates to the minecraft youtuber "FieryZane" and adds new awesome features to make minecraft more destructive and fun!
body:
“The FriedZane Mod” is a mod that adds new features and new bosses to the game. It is based on a YouTuber called “FieryZane.” He is a Minecraft YouTuber, and you can check out his channel. The Friedzane Mod adds new items such as the “FriedZane,” the “Gloo Sword,” the “Fried Katana,” the “Green Bomb,” and the “Kareena Gun.”

There are also new bosses, such as “FieryZane/The Dictator,” “Gloo Gunner,” “Kareena,” and “ka1b23i/Kai.” Each boss has a unique weapon: FieryZane/The Dictator has the Fried Katana, Gloog Gunner has the Gloo Sword, Kareena has the Kareena Gun, and ka1b23i/Kai has the Green Bomb. Each weapon has its own properties: the Fried Katana is fast and strong, the Gloo's Sword is a sword made of gloo that slows anyone hit by it, the Green Bomb is the most destructive weapon, exploding instantly, and the Kareena Gun is the fastest but not the most accurate, since it fires instantly and requires good aim.

There are also secret weapons and bosses: Minter, David, and Darastrixkepesk, which are references to the creators of the mod. Each secret boss has a unique weapon as well: Minter has the Mintersword, David has the Orbital Strike, and Darastrixkepesk has the Bane of Everything sword. Each of these weapons has special properties: the Mintersword has a special attack that triggers every 5 hits, granting the wielder Sharpness 10 for 1 hit before resetting, and it also has a blocking ability. The Orbital Strike is a weapon that cannot be activated by ordinary players (it will be accessible in future updates) and is the most destructive weapon, currently only accessible through commands. Lastly, the Bane of Everything is a sword that cannot— and I repeat, cannot—be obtained. It can one-shot everything, no matter how powerful, making it the most powerful weapon of all.
(P.S. the bane of everything will be obtainable via commands cuz i got bored-)

The FriedZane Mod is a mod for everyone who likes FieryZane. Download it if you enjoy FieryZane’s content.
